landing.title: The Financial Infrastructure for AI Agents
landing.subtitle: AI agents are becoming economic actors. PayJarvis provides identity, trust scores, and transaction guardrails so they can safely interact with merchants, APIs, and payment systems.
landing.problemTitle: AI agents are spending money. No one can verify them.
landing.problemDesc: Autonomous agents already make financial decisions. They buy, subscribe, and pay. But merchants have no way to verify who the agent is or whether it should be trusted.
landing.problemWarning: Without identity and trust infrastructure, agents are unverifiable, unaccountable, and unsafe.
landing.solutionTitle: PayJarvis sits between AI agents and financial systems
landing.solutionDesc: Identity verification, trust evaluation, and transaction policy enforcement in one layer.
landing.sol1Desc: Each agent gets a signed Agent Identity Token (AIT). Merchants verify it using JWKS — no API call needed.
landing.sol2Desc: A 0-1000 reputation score computed from transaction history, compliance, and behavior patterns.
landing.sol3Desc: Programmable limits per transaction, per day, per week, per month. Enforced automatically.
landing.sol4Desc: Transactions that violate policies or trust thresholds are blocked before execution.
landing.trustTitle: Every AI agent gets a Trust Score
landing.trustDesc: PayJarvis computes a 0-1000 reputation score for each agent. The score determines how much financial autonomy the agent receives.
landing.trustLow: Score < 400: blocked or requires human review
landing.demoDesc1: Agent with trust score 320 attempts $5,000 GPU purchase
landing.demoBlockedReason: Trust score below threshold. Transaction blocked automatically.
landing.demoApprovedReason: Trust score 840. Within policy limits. AIT token issued.
landing.devDesc: PayJarvis wraps every financial action your AI agent takes. One SDK. Full coverage.
landing.futureTitle: The trust layer for AI agent commerce
landing.futureDesc: AI agents need financial infrastructure the same way humans need banks. Identity, reputation, and authorization — built for machines.
landing.future1Desc: Cryptographic identity tokens that merchants can verify independently.
landing.future2Desc: Trust scores that follow agents across merchants and platforms.
landing.future3Desc: Verify agent trust via JWKS. No API dependency. Sub-5ms validation.
landing.future4Desc: Spending rules as code. Category restrictions. Time-based controls.
landing.ctaTitle: Your AI agents are ready to transact. Are you ready to trust them?
landing.ctaDesc: Set up identity, trust scores, and financial guardrails in minutes. Open source. Free to start.
landing.footer: PayJarvis — Financial Infrastructure for AI Agents

install.title: Install PayJarvis
install.subtitle: Integrate bot verification in your e-commerce
install.htmlTitle: Add the script tag to your checkout
install.htmlDesc: Paste before </body> on the checkout page. The script automatically detects BDIT tokens and verifies bot identity.
install.htmlReplace: Replace YOUR_MERCHANT_ID with your merchant ID.
install.woo2: In WordPress, go to Plugins > Add New > Upload Plugin
install.woo3: Upload the .zip and click Install Now
install.woo6: Configure your Merchant ID and API Key
install.shopifyDesc: The PayJarvis app for Shopify adds automatic bot verification at checkout.
install.shopify1: Go to the Shopify App Store and search for "PayJarvis"
install.shopify3: Configure your Merchant ID in the app settings
install.shopify4: Bot verification will be automatically activated at checkout

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Connect your payment providers
paymentMethods.stripeDesc: Accept credit cards, debit cards and more
paymentMethods.addCardDesc: Save a credit or debit card for payments
paymentMethods.cardSaveFailed: Failed to save card. Try again.
paymentMethods.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured on the server
paymentMethods.securityNotice: Your card details are processed directly by Stripe — PayJarvis never stores or has access to your card number.

integrations.subtitle: Connect your favorite services. Your assistant will use these to search and book.
integrations.dashboardSubtitle: Manage which services your bot can use to search, book, and buy.

integrations.systemPromptHint: Paste in Settings > System Prompt in Clawdbot
integrations.connectionFailed: Connection failed — check the URL and if the gateway is running

partners.title: Prepare your e-commerce for the
partners.subtitle: Verify the identity of bot buyers in milliseconds. No friction, no risk, no chargebacks.
partners.problemDesc: In 2026, a growing share of online purchases will be made by AI agents. How will you know if the bot buying was authorized by the human owner?
partners.sol1Desc: Each bot receives a cryptographically signed BDIT token.
partners.sol2Desc: Local verification with public key. No latency, no API.
partners.sol3Desc: Verified bots pass through seamlessly. Transparent experience.
partners.how1Desc: One line. Node.js, Python, PHP, Java or Go.
partners.how2Desc: Local verification in <5ms. No API call.
partners.ben1Desc: Unauthorized bots are blocked before purchasing.
partners.ben2Desc: Certified bots pass through — verification in <5ms.
partners.ben3Desc: Understand how AI agents interact with your store.
partners.ben4Desc: When 30% of purchases are from bots, you'll be ready.
partners.thankYouDesc: Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

step4.title: Payment Method
step4.subtitle: Choose how your bot will process payments.
step4.sdkDesc: Use the SDK to process payments programmatically. No card needed now — configure later in Settings.

step4.stripeNote: Your card data is processed directly by Stripe — PayJarvis never stores your card number.

step4.cardSaveFailed: Failed to save card. Please try again.

step5.title: Terms of Service
step5.subtitle: Review and accept the terms to activate your account.
step5.term1: Your AI agent's financial activity is monitored and subject to spending limits you define.
step5.term2: PayJarvis verifies agent identity using cryptographic tokens (BDIT). You are responsible for your agent's actions.
step5.term3: Fraudulent or unauthorized use may result in account suspension.
step5.term4: Trust scores are computed from transaction history and may affect transaction approval.
step5.term5: PayJarvis does not store payment card details — all card processing is handled by Stripe.
step5.term6: You agree to comply with applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction.
step5.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the PayJarvis Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
step5.successDesc: Your account is active. Redirecting to your dashboard...
